member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ContractTextExtraction.ContractEthicalClauseExtractor
member.summary: Extracts the "Ethical Clause" section from a contract PDF without OCR.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ContractTextExtraction.ContractEthicalClauseExtractor.EthicalClauseHeaderRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\s*§\\s*\\d+\\s+Ethical\\s+Clause\\b.*$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Multiline | RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of a line.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '§'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of a line.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ContractTextExtraction.ContractEthicalClauseExtractor.CodeOfConductHeaderRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\s*(?:§\\s*\\d+\\s*)?.*\\bcode\\s+of\\s+conduct\\b.*$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Multiline | RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of a line.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '§'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Ff].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of a line.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ContractTextExtraction.ContractEthicalClauseExtractor.AnySectionHeaderRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\s*§\\s*\\d+\\b.*$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Multiline | RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of a line.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '§'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least once.
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of a line.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ContractTextExtraction.ContractEthicalClauseExtractor.DotLeaderRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\.{8,}
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match '.' atomically at least 8 times.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ContractTextExtraction.ContractEthicalClauseExtractor.PageNumberAtEndRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\.{2,}\\s*\\d+\\s*$
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match '.' atomically at least twice.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.ContractTextExtraction.ContractEthicalClauseExtractor.MyRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[ \\t]+\\r?\\n
Options:
RegexOptions.CultureInvariant
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [\t ] atomically at least once.
○ Match '\r' atomically, optionally.
○ Match '\n'.

member.summary: Whether the page is compliant ("true") or not ("false"). An empty value combined with a non-empty indicates the page was not processed.

member.name: P:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsEmailNotificationRow.PageReportBlobPath
member.summary: Blob path of the per-URL xlsx report, formatted as {containerName}/{blobPath}. Empty when no report was generated (e.g. parse error rows).

member.name: T:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsEmailNotificationService
member.summary:
Iterates over a parsed meta-report and dispatches Dutch-language notification emails according to the sustainability claims compliance rules:
Page compliant → do nothing.
Page not compliant, both accountable & responsible known → email both.
Page not compliant, accountable or responsible missing → email .
Page not processed (error) → email and .
Processes all rows in a meta-report and sends notification emails where required.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsEmailNotificationService.BuildNonCompliantEmailBody(GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.SustainabilityClaims.SustainabilityClaimsEmailNotificationRow)
member.summary: Builds the Dutch email body for a non-compliant page with known accountable and responsible. Template is taken verbatim from the user story (work item 808890).

member.summary: Builds the fallback body for a non-compliant page with no known owner.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService.MultipleLineBreaksRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\n\\s*\\n\\s*\\n+
Explanation:
○ Match '\n'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '\n'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match '\n' atomically at least once.

member.name: M:GenAiIncubator.LlmUtils.Core.Services.WebContentNormalization.WebContentNormalizationService.MultipleSpacesRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[ \\t]+
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [\t ] atomically at least once.
